title: Stop letting talent slip through the cracks
text:
HelpLog in

TestGorilla LogoTestGorilla Logo

Pricing

# Stop letting talent slip through the cracks

Resumes alone are a bad proxy for skill. Stop wasting time on unqualified interviews and start identifying your top performers confidently. Determine candidate fit before interviews with skills tests, AI interviews, Resume scoring, talent assessment tools, and more.

Try for free!

## Solve your biggest hiring challenges

53%

of employers say determining skills is the hardest part of their hiring process

*Source*

87%

of employers say they're having problems with resumes

*Source*

59%

of candidates struggle to stand out with their resume alone

*Source*

## 1\. Start with a job description

Let our AI lay the groundwork. You get fair, consistent assessments every time.

It all starts with your job. Drop in the details and we’ll recommend your ideal assessment. Always fast, fair, and skills-first.

Or just start with a job title. Our AI will handle the rest, filling in the blanks with role-relevant tests and smart custom questions.

The right tests, custom questions, and AI interviews, in under a minute. Want to switch it up? Our AI job builder is fully editable so you're always in control. Built for skills-based hiring, every assessment is designed to evaluate what candidates can actually do.

Create an assessment

## 2\. Choose from a range of assessment tools

Context-rich hiring starts here. Mix-and-match talent assessment tools to create assessments uniquely suited for your job role.

## 350+ skills tests

Assess cognitive ability, communication, technical and role-specific skills, and more. All tests are scientifically validated by experts.

Learn more

## AI interviews

Get deep, role-specific insights in minutes. AI asks follow-ups and auto-scores candidate responses, using scoring criteria you control.

See for yourself

## Resume scoring

Forget keyword filters – resume scoring evaluates every resume against your job description in seconds to give you a best-fit list.

Learn more

## Custom questions

Choose from our library or create your own questions to assess how candidates think, solve problems, and tackle tasks.

Learn more

## Qualifying questions

Quick yes/no and multiple-choice screening questions that filter out irrelevant candidates early. Only the right candidates move forward.

Learn more

## Trust Layer

Built-in safeguard that keeps results fast, fair, and defensible, without slowing honest candidates down. Gives you identity confidence and clear, meaningful trust signals.

Learn more

Start assessing skills

## 3\. Analyze and compare, with automatic scoring

Compare assessed candidates side-by-side. The best part? You don't need to stress about the scoring.

Every skills test comes with built-in scoring, so you can see exactly how each candidate stacks up. Percentile rankings are backed by real performance data, helping you measure skills and make comparisons quick, fair, and effortless.

From essays to video interviews, our AI scores bring clarity to the even the fuzziest of answers. Get consistent, bias-free results, based on criteria you set.

Track certain candidate activity during assessments, giving you a detailed behavior log for every session. If cheating is a concern, you’ll have what you need to make decisions fairly.

Try auto-scoring now

## Your shortlist looking short? We’ve got  2m+ more

Each of the 2m+ candidates in our talent pool is pre-tested on role-specific skills. Combine TestGorilla Sourcing with TestGorilla Assessments to reach skilled job seekers, faster.

Learn more about Sourcing

## Why guess when you can assess?

Start assessing skills

## FAQs

An assessment is a collection of tests and questions you send to candidates. You can combine our 350+ skills tests, add your own custom questions, resume scoring, and video questions to get a complete picture of a candidate's abilities, personality, and cultural alignment.

We designed the experience to be simple, engaging, and fair. Candidates receive a direct link to their assessment. They are given clear instructions for each test and question. By focusing on skills, a TestGorilla Assessment gives candidates a fair opportunity to showcase their true abilities.

Results are clear and easy to understand. You get a side-by-side comparison of all candidates, ranked by their overall score. You can see percentile scores for each skills test, read or watch responses to custom questions, and review any anti-cheating flags, all in one simple dashboard.

We offer a range of plans to fit every company size, from free trials to test the platform to scalable enterprise plans. You can start for free to try some of our basic Assessments features. See pricing here.

TestGorilla assessments are designed to replace the manual resume screening and initial phone screening steps. You send an assessment invite to all applicants and let our platform automatically score and rank the best fits, giving you a high-quality shortlist for in-depth interviews.

You can build assessments for almost any role, from highly technical positions (like Senior Developers or Data Scientists) to customer-facing roles (like Sales Executives or Customer Support) and operational roles (like Project Managers or Finance).

You can create and send your first assessment in under 5 minutes. Our AI-powered assessment builder recommends the best tests based on your job title or description, so all you have to do is review, add any custom questions, and send the invites.
